title: pyrus hirsuta
intro: Pyrus hirsuta, also known as the hairy pear or downy pear, is a species of pear tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Pyrus hirsuta include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried forms for medicinal use.
